tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: You Cant Always Get What You Want
Hey Hey What Can I Do
You Dont Love Me No No No

content:
[Intro] F  - C - Am, G (all the way thru')

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Wha- wha- what did she say[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
Mmmm whatcha say,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]             , [ch]G[/ch]
Mmm that you only meant well?[/tab]
Well of course you didn't
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
Mmmm whatcha say,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]              , [ch]G[/ch]
Mmmm that it's all for the best?[/tab]
Of course it is

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
I was so wrong for so long[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Only tryin' to please myself (myself)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Girl, I was caught up in her lust [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
When I don't really want no one else[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
So, no I know I should of treated you better[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]              ,F
But me and you were meant to last forever[/tab]

[Hook]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]                                     ,Am
So let me in (let me in) give me another chance (another chance)[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
To really be your man[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Cause when the roof caved in and the truth came out[/tab]
           Am               ,G
I just didn't know what to do
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
But when I become a star we'll be living so large[/tab]
          Am             ,G
I'll do anything for you

So tell me girl
